hero.title:
One link.
Every fan touchpoint.
hero.subtitle: Beam is the link-in-bio built for creators who care about design. Unite Instagram, YouTube, podcasts, products, and your email list on one beautiful page.
hero.ctaNote: No credit card. 30 seconds to live.

social.title: Every channel, one home
social.subtitle: Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Threads, Spotify, LINE, and 30+ more — built-in icons, your brand color, one tap to follow.

features.title: Every block you need
features.description: Links, banners, videos, products, forms, calendars — drag and drop to build a page that's truly yours.

features.title: Theme your brand
features.description: 8 presets or fully custom colors, gradient backgrounds, and button styles. Your brand, pixel-perfect.

features.title: Real-time analytics
features.description: Track visitors, clicks, and top-performing blocks — and iterate on what actually works.

features.title: Sell digital products
features.description: Stripe built-in. Sell courses, e-books, and templates directly from your page — no storefront needed.

features.title: Grow your email list
features.description: Embed email capture forms, own your audience, and stop renting attention from the algorithm.

features.title: Multiple pages, one account
features.description: One account, many pages. Split by topic — courses, partnerships, personal — with named tabs.

steps.title: Create an account
steps.description: Pick a username. No credit card. Done in 30 seconds.

steps.title: Add your blocks
steps.description: Drag, drop, and edit. Preview updates instantly as you build.

steps.title: Share one link
steps.description: Drop it in your IG bio, YouTube, Threads, or anywhere else. One link to rule them all.

useCases.title: Built for every kind of creator

items.title: IG / YouTube creators
items.description: Send fans to your latest video, sponsorship link, or merch — all in one place.

items.title: Course & product sellers
items.description: Sell digital products with Stripe. Capture emails before launch. Run countdowns for limited offers.

items.title: Podcasters
items.description: Link Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and YouTube in one tap. Let listeners support you with a coffee.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

items.a: Yes. The free plan stays free forever. Upgrade to Pro only when you need unlimited blocks, more pages, or to remove the watermark.
Yes. Paste your linktr.ee or portaly.cc URL and Beam pulls your links, socials, name, bio, and avatar in 30 seconds.
Connect a Stripe account in settings. Add a product block, set a price, and customers buy directly from your page. Beam takes a small commission depending on plan.

items.q: Can I use a custom domain?
items.a: Yes, on the Premium plan. Point your domain at Beam and we handle SSL.

items.q: Do you take a cut of my email subscribers?
items.a: Never. Subscribers belong to you. Export the list anytime as CSV.

profile.subscribeError: Something went wrong, please try again

admin.noBlocksSubtitle: Pick a starter template, or build from scratch.
admin.blockManagementHint: Drag to reorder. Click the eye to hide.
admin.saveUnsaved: Unsaved changes. Click 'Save all' on the right.
admin.openInNewTab: Open full page in new tab

steps.pickStyle: Pick a visual style (corners / animation / brand color)

profileEditor.bannerHint: Recommended size 1200×400 (3:1). Shows at the top of your public page.
profileEditor.socialHelp: Drag the handle to reorder. Click upload to add a custom icon.
profileEditor.iconHint: Square 1:1, 512×512+ (auto-cropped to circle). Transparent PNG / SVG looks best.

themeEditor.cornerStyleHint: Pick a cut-corner style for all card blocks (links, banners, products, carousel…).
themeEditor.entranceHint: Animation each block plays as it enters view. Respects the visitor's reduced-motion preference.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your Beam page
auth.signupSubtitle: Pick a username — that's all we need
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.setPasswordSubtitle: doesn't have a password yet. Set one now.
auth.usernameTakenSwitch: This username is taken — if it's yours, sign in below. Otherwise pick another.
auth.usernameRules: Letters, numbers, _, -, . only. 3–30 chars. Dots can't lead, trail, or repeat.
auth.firstTimeHint: First time? Just enter a username and password to sign up.

toast.iconRemindSave: Icon uploaded. Click 'Save all' to apply.

errors.checkoutFailed: Checkout failed, please try again later
